the task is to emulate the delete confirmation page behavior before saving certain models in the admin.  
in this scenario, when an object is modified, dependent objects should be deleted based on the object's out-of-date state.  
to achieve this, the parent model's save method can handle the cascaded updates, but a confirmation step is necessary to prevent irreversible actions.
